title: Greenpill Garden — Season One
dek: Public Hub sources and the approved Paragraph preview give the website a launch-safe Garden story for stewardship, workshops, protocols, and next-step onboarding.
excerpt: A public Garden story connecting chapters, stewards, workshops, protocols, tools, impact reporting, the website revamp, and the 2026 Garden model.
body:
Greenpill Garden remains editorial site content for now, not a guild project.

The public Garden thread supports copy about stewardship, chapters, impact reporting, tools, IRL events, and Greenpill's need for a clearer onboarding surface. A February 2026 update adds launch-safe context about strategy workshops, feedback sessions, worksheets, and the next phase of the season.

The Regen Protocols thread adds supporting public context for Garden-adjacent onchain protocols and steward support systems. The approved Paragraph preview adds a clearer 2026 frame: a five-month Garden incubation launched at DevConnect, Theory of Change and coherent design strategy workshops, CIDS/outcomes work, tooling implementation, and a summer 2026 harvest.

Keep this material editorial until the network chooses an operational owner model for Garden. Knowledge Garden, Sarafu, and Regen Reservoir references should support the Garden narrative without becoming operational records in this batch.

Internal Garden Guide details should stay out of launch content until approved.

## Sources

- S042: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/greenpill-garden-season-one/363
- S050: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/regen-protocols/364
- S071: https://paragraph.com/@greenpill/preview/rN8MvIeOa4RGvE8kJN9L
author: Greenpill Network research
